name: Secova Metals Corp.
summary: Secova Metals Corp., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of mineral properties in Canada. The company primarily explores for gold deposits. It principally holds a 100% interest in the Eagle River project, which consists of 77 claims or 4,354 contiguous hectares in the Windfall Lake gold district, Quebec. The company was formerly known as Nova Uranium Corporation and changed its name to Secova Metals Corp. in December 2009. Secova Metals Corp. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
